QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_72

question.text: The CRA must send the annual Statement of Transaction (SOT) to subscribers within how many months of the financial year end?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The CRA must send the annual Statement of Transaction (SOT) within 2 months of the financial year end (i.e., by May 31). **The Trap:** This is a specific timeline requirement. The SOT provides the subscriber with a consolidated view of all transactions and corpus value. **Cross-Exam Context:** SOT is similar to a CAS (Consolidated Account Statement) in mutual funds. It gives the subscriber a complete picture of their NPS investments. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Remind clients to review their SOT when received. It is the primary document for tracking NPS performance and verifying contributions.
